items.quote: Art is not what you see, but what you make others see. It is the bridge between the human heart and the world it inhabits — a bridge built not with wood or steel, but with empathy, courage, and the quiet persistence of creation.
items.source: Edgar Degas (adapted) · On the purpose of art

items.quote: The arts are not a way to make a living. They are a very human way of making life more bearable.
Community is the antidote to the loneliness of modernity. Art is how we remember that we were never alone.
Development is about expanding the real freedoms that people enjoy — the freedom to live the life one has reason to value.
In every community there is work to be done. In every nation, there are wounds to heal. In every heart there is the power to do it.
